title: Beast
content:
{{Otheruses|Beast}} {{CharHub|Beast|Hank McCoy}} {{AltUniverse|the "[[X-Men Ally Binary Universe]]"|3=Characters|4=1}} {{Character |image = Beast Infobox.png |real name = Henry {{Conjecture|Philip}} McCoy{{Ref|TMC}}{{Ref|Conjec}} |alias = {{Alias |primary = Hank McCoy{{Ref|TMC}} |codenames = Beast{{Ref|TMC}}}} |species = [[Mutant]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |title = Doctor |affiliation = {{Affiliation|XXAB}} |movie = ''[[The Marvels]]'' ([[List of Post-credits Scenes|mid-credits scene]])
''[[Avengers: Doomsday]]'' (unreleased)[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aZXBFirj6b4 Avengers: Doomsday | Now in Production] |actor = [[Kelsey Grammer]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|Confusion is but the first step on the journey to knowledge.|Beast|The Marvels}} Doctor '''Henry {{Conjecture|Philip}} "Hank" McCoy''' is a [[mutant]] and a member of the [[X-Men/X-Men Ally Binary|X-Men]] known as '''Beast'''. ==Biography== ===Meeting Monica Rambeau=== {{Quote|We were hoping you could tell us. All we know is that [[Binary]] found you. My theory? That you fell through a tear in space-time. You are now in a [[X-Men Ally Binary Universe|reality]] parallel to your own, which is of course impossible.|Beast to [[Monica Rambeau]]|The Marvels}} [[File:Beast & Binary.png|{{AltFloat}}|Beast and [[Binary]] discuss [[Monica Rambeau]]]] When [[Binary]] found [[Monica Rambeau]] adrift in space, she brought her to the [[X-Mansion]] to recover and be examined by Beast, who theorized that Rambeau was from an alternate universe and had crossed over from a tear in space-time. When Rambeau woke up, Beast joined her and Binary, explaining his theory to them. Binary told Beast that Rambeau seemed confused and that she would deal with her, so Beast went to update [[Professor X/X-Men Ally Binary|Charles Xavier]], leaving the two alone.{{Ref|TM}} {{Clear}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Mutant Physiology''': Beast has a bestial appearance with pointed ears, blue skin and fur, bright yellow eyes, and razor-sharp teeth and claws. ===Abilities=== *'''Genius-Level Intellect''': Beast is a highly intelligent individual and considered a genius. *'''Master Scientist''': Beast is an expert in science, genetics, biochemistry, electronics, mechanics, technology and several other subjects. ==Facilities== *'''[[X-Mansion]]''': Beast's laboratory is located in the X-Mansion, where he is able to report his findings to the headmaster, Charles Xavier. He is also able to demonstrate his findings to other residents of the facility, including Binary. ==Relationships== ===Allies=== *[[X-Men/X-Men Ally Binary|X-Men]] - Teammates **[[Professor X/X-Men Ally Binary|Charles Xavier/Professor X]] *[[Binary|Maria Rambeau/Binary]] *[[Monica Rambeau]] ==Trivia== *In the comics, Doctor Hank McCoy is a [[mutant]] who, due to testing an experimental solution on himself, possesses animalistic physical characteristics. He is also a genius-level intellect specializing in biochemistry and genetics and a political activist fighting against society's discrimination against mutants. He served as a member of the [[X-Men]], [[Avengers]] and the [[Defenders]]. ==Behind the Scenes== *Beast in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] is the second live-action incarnation of the character, following an incarnation portrayed by [[Kelsey Grammer]] and {{WPS|Nicholas Hoult}}. *According to [[Mary Livanos (producer)|Mary Livanos]], [[Kelsey Grammer]] reprised his role as Beast because [[Marvel Studios]] head [[Kevin Feige]] personally called him and asked him to do it; Grammer readily agreed due to their past collaboration in ''{{WPS|X-Men: The Last Stand}}'', which Feige was an executive producer on.[https://ew.com/movies/the-marvels-mary-livanos-spoiler-interview/ ''The Marvels'' producer on cats, musical numbers, and that major mid-credits scene] *The CGI effects for Beast were created by Industrial Light & Magic.[https://beforesandafters.com/2023/12/06/heres-how-beast-was-made-for-that-end-credits-scene-in-the-marvels/ Here's How Beast Was Made For That End Credits Scene in The Marvels] ==Gallery== Hank McCoy (Beast).png Beast and Binary.png Beast & Binary.png Beast concept art by Andy Park (1).jpg Beast concept art by Andy Park (2).jpg Beast concept art by Andy Park (3).jpg ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP|Beast (Marvel Comics)|Beast}} [[ru:Зверь]] [[es:Henry McCoy]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:The Marvels Characters]] [[Category:Avengers: Doomsday Characters]] [[Category:Mutants]] [[Category:Blue Hair]] [[Category:Yellow Eyes]] [[Category:Scientists]] [[Category:Physicians]] [[Category:X-Men Members/X-Men Ally Binary]]
